retrieved_result: Oscar Snubs and Surprises Movies Oscar Snubs and Surprises By CARA BUCKLEY JAN. 24, 2017As predicted, “La La Land” led the Oscar nominations announced Tuesday, with 14 nods, but the list was also filled with snubs and surprises, especially in the best actress category, which has been the most competitive this season.
